\[ z_i = \frac{y_i}{1-y_i} \implies z_i (1 - y_i) = y_i \implies z_i - z_i y_i = y_i \implies z_i = y_i + z_i y_i \implies z_i = y_i (1 + z_i) \implies y_i = \frac{z_i}{1 + z_i} \]
